disclaimer: Phase 6 occurrence ledger — not a corpus PASS. Phase 4 remains safe-but-unresolved. Do not merge / deploy / Phase 7 until ledger balances or every discrepancy has auditable disposition.

phase3_copyableExportableOccurrences.definition: One count per (fixture × mode∈{copy,api}) when a batch gate of up to 16 strings returns integrity_blocked including the ruleId. Not a unique-string count. Dual-mode ≈ ×2 when both modes fire.

phase5_scannedCopyableHits.definition: One count per defective string (first 20 of deeper walk up to 50) that copy-gates as integrity_blocked for raw_extraction_marker or truncated_fragment.

uniqueDiagnostics.definition: Distinct len=N;hash=… diagnostic strings across hits.

truncationCrosswalk.warning: Phase-3 28 and Phase-5 55 are different units — never subtract them directly.

phase3.explanation: Published 28 ≈ dual-mode (copy+api). Primary underlying stock ≈ copy-channel count; api-channel rows are proven_duplicate of the copy sibling.

how28RelateTo55.note: The earlier baseline of 28 is NOT a subset of 55 string IDs. It is 28 mode×fixture batch firings (= 14 unique fixtures × copy+api). Correspondence:

userFraming28vs27.clarification: 55−28=27 is invalid (mixed units). Correct: P3 28 rule-firings ↔ 14 unique fixtures; of 55 P5 per-string hits, 14 match those baseline fixtures+diagnostic; remaining 41 are newly discovered on other fixtures (deeper walk).
userFraming28vs27.whyWrong: 55−28 mixes per-string hits with dual-mode batch firings
